message:
feat(recorder): add parity validation tests for event reader cursor seam

Adds 9 parity tests proving run_with_reader() produces identical results
to legacy run() across single events, 100-event batches, partial batches,
mixed pane IDs, schema mismatch skipping, and document field equality.
Includes mock FrankenSqlite cursor test validating cross-backend abstraction.

Closes ft-2vuw7.1.4.1.2.1.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
